label: Bossgroup
description: Defines a bossgroup that controls wave escalation and quest data for a mechanoid boss encounter. The boss and waves fields are required.

boss.label: Boss
boss.description: BossDef that this bossgroup belongs to.

waves.label: Waves
waves.description: Ordered list of wave definitions. The first encounter uses wave 0; repeat encounters cycle from repeatWaveStartIndex onward.

repeatWaveStartIndex.label: Repeat wave start index
repeatWaveStartIndex.description: Index into waves at which repeat encounters begin cycling. Must be lower than the wave count. Defaults to 0.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements bossgroup logic. Defaults to BossgroupWorker and is not set in any shipped data.

leaderDescription.label: Leader description
leaderDescription.description: Player-facing description of the boss leader shown in the bossgroup UI. Supports the {LEADERKIND_label} token.

quest.label: Quest
quest.description: QuestScriptDef triggered when a bossgroup wave is encountered.

rewardDef.label: Reward def
rewardDef.description: ThingDef awarded as a reward upon defeating this bossgroup.

new-bossgroup.label: New bossgroup
new-bossgroup.description: Minimal bossgroup with a def name, label, boss reference, reward def, and one empty wave.
